guidance.technical_volume: Technical Volume is the main proposal document. Assemble from Wave 6 formatted output.
guidance.cost_volume: Cost Volume uses the DoD SBIR/STTR Cost Volume template from DSIP portal.
guidance.firm_certification: Download Firm Certification from DSIP portal (https://www.dodsbirsttr.mil) under 'Forms & Templates'.
guidance.fraud_waste_abuse: Download Fraud, Waste, and Abuse Training certification from DSIP portal.
